'''Kril''' were [[Sentience/Legends|unintelligent]], harmless arboreal [[Diet/Legends|herbivores]] native to [[Kidron/Legends|Kidron]]. They were easy prey and also raised by the [[Orfite]]s as the mainstay of their diet.<ref name="AE" /> A local company, [[Attakril Meats]], exported their flesh throughout the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. People who acted out of stupidity were derogatorily called "krilheads."
